0.text: Minimal bronchiectasis in the central parts of both lungs

1.text: Peribronchial thickening in the central parts of both lungs

3.text: Significant interlobular septal thickening in both lungs, more prominent in the lower lobe

4.text: Consolidation in the laterobasal and anteromediobasal segments of the left lower lobe

5.text: Consolidation in the inferior subsegment of the lingular segment of the left upper lobe

6.text: Centriacinar nodules in the lower lobe of the left lung

7.text: Atelectasis in the middle lobe of the right lung

8.text: Atelectasis in the lingular segment of the left upper lobe
